content.en:
Now, Ye Tian has broken through to the high-level cultivation of the Eternal Realm God Realm, and then he is ready to plan to make the human race a top force.

Once the Terran becomes the top force, it can send ten Realm Gods to the Realm Headquarters to hold important positions, and they will also have a certain say in the Realm Headquarters.

Of course.

At present, the Terran only has one high-level realm god, which is not enough to qualify the Terran to become a top force.

Top forces are not so easy to be born, if a high-level realm god can be born to become a top force, then it is too easy for top forces.

Moreover, the responsibilities of the top forces were heavier, and if that high-level realm god was killed, wouldn't the top forces immediately fall to a powerful force?

Therefore, it is very demanding to become a top power.

First of all, three high-level realm gods must be born, as well as ten middle-level realm gods at the peak of the middle rank of the Eternal Realm God Realm.

It is an Eternal Realm Divine Realm mid-level peak Realm Realm Realm Realm that condenses six Eternal Realm Spirits, but it is not an ordinary middle-level Realm God, in addition, the number of Realm Gods must reach a thousand, if there is no such strength, it will not be able to become a top force at all.

As for the site, it's simple, as long as the site is not small.

If you really have the strength of a top power, it will be too easy to expand your territory.

However, according to Ye Tian's understanding, many of the top forces in the Eastern Wu Realm are actually not slowly developing, but joint forces.

For example, one of the powerful forces has a high-level realm god, and several middle-level realm gods at the peak of the middle rank, so it can't become a top force at all, but there are two other forces, which are almost the same strength.

So, these three forces united and combined into a single force, so that they could pass the assessment of the Realm Court and become the top force.

Once you become a top power, there are too many benefits, and in the future, you can also hope to get more resources and treasures, so as to cultivate more middle-level realm gods and high-level realm gods.

Some forces have gradually merged into one force over the long years, almost indistinguishable from each other.

However, some of the top forces are not well integrated, and they are still fragmented, but they are still one force on the surface, but in fact, they have been secretly divided into several forces, and they are not even in the same territory, and their management and development are all taking care of their own.

For example, the top force in the Eastern Wu Realm, the Flowing Fire Holy Alliance, this top force is also very powerful, and there are many high-level realm gods, but it is split into five veins, each of which is actually a separate force.

Of course, even if the Flowing Fire Holy Alliance really split into five forces, each of them would have the strength of the top forces.

It's just that they can't be separated casually, if they really separate, only one force can maintain the reputation of the top force, but the other forces will not be recognized by the Boundary Alliance.

If it is recognized, many top forces will choose to do this, splitting more top power branches to obtain more benefits, and then it will be chaotic.

It is precisely because of this provision that the five veins of the Flowing Fire Holy Alliance are not divided into five forces.

......

"It is impossible for the human race to combine with other forces, it still has to develop slowly, my wife and children, as long as they have enough Black Leaf Demon Gold, there is no problem in raising the Eternal Dao Seed to the current limit, and the resources I found to assist in condensing the Eternal Realm Spirit are all left to them, and the success rate of their breakthrough should be more than fifty percent'~." Ye Tian thought to himself.

A 50 percent chance is already pretty good.

Even if they can't all break through for the first time, there will definitely be a first breakthrough.

When the time comes, there will naturally be no problem in gathering the three high-level realm gods.

The current realm gods of the human race are also being born one by one, and it is not too difficult to gather a thousand realm gods in the future, the only problem is that they have to gather ten middle-level peak realm gods of the eternal realm god realm, which will take a long time to cultivate.

Ye Tian and his wife and children were able to ascend to the peak cultivation of the middle level of the Eternal Realm God Realm so quickly because they had cultivated a perfect-level Eternal Dao Seed, and they could use some resources to quickly improve the Eternal Dao Seed, and they didn't have to worry about the Eternal Demon Seed.

But other realm gods can't do this, of course, there are similar resources, and the side effects are low, but they are too precious!

That's the difference!

"Next, we need to cultivate some Terran genius realm gods, but the focus is still on themselves!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

In the following days, Ye Tian took out some more resources to cultivate the genius realm gods among the human race, and the focus was on cultivating the realm gods among the descendants of the Ye family.

And just like that, the long years passed. []

The realm gods in the human race were born one after another, but it was difficult for the middle-level realm gods to give birth to another one.

Seeing this, Ye Tian didn't expect the human race to become a top force in a short period of time.

Of course.

Even if the Terran is not a top force, he is not afraid of the general top forces now, and with his strength, he can sweep away those top forces with his own strength.

After all, he himself is equivalent to a number of high-level realm gods cultivated at the peak of the Eternal Realm God Realm, copying their bodies one by one and not being afraid of falling, which top force can be as powerful as him?

......

Eternal borders.

In an area near the Endless Realm Alliance, on this day, a Terran Eternal Dao Realm was exploring here, and suddenly found that the death zone here actually exuded a vibrant aura, and the death zone here was slowly transforming into a treasure land.

Seeing such a wonderful thing, he immediately returned and reported this (Mo Qian Zhao) phenomenon to the human race, and also passed it on to Ye Tian's ears.

"'A Death Zone area suddenly turned into a treasure land?'

Ye Tian was also surprised.

According to his understanding, except for some inherent treasure land, and the use of the Eternal Kingdom Decree to open up the Eternal Kingdom, which can reverse the death zone and turn it into a treasure land, under other circumstances, it is impossible to reverse the death zone at all.

If the death zone can be turned into a treasure land, then those top forces in the realm of the god realm will not give up the eternal realm, but will have already moved to the eternal realm one by one.

Everyone knows that the Eternal Realm is the real Main Realm, and the Realm of the Gods is only attached to the Eternal Realm.

Moreover, the territory of the Eternal Realm is even vast, and who wouldn't want to develop the Eternal Realm!

After getting the news, Ye Tian immediately came here to check the situation here.
